gold.title: Animated Glassy Pricing
gold.reason: WebGL shader canvas background with animated gradient circles, glassmorphism cards with backdrop-blur, RippleButton CTA, and dark/light theme adaptation. Unique WebGL integration sets it apart as a production-ready premium section.

gold.title: Pricing
gold.reason: 3-tier section with Framer Motion card animations, canvas-confetti burst on yearly toggle activation, NumberFlow animated price transitions, popular plan highlight badge, and highest community engagement (7,700 downloads / 71 likes).

gold.title: Pricing Section
gold.reason: 4-tier Dub.co-style section with spring layout-animated Tab toggle, discount percentage badge, highlighted popular card with grid background pattern, and the highest like count in the set (4,600 downloads / 94 likes).

gold.title: Pricing Section 4
gold.reason: Full dark-screen section combining sparkles canvas, blurred blue ellipse glows, vertical-cut-reveal heading text, timeline scroll-triggered card entrance animations, NumberFlow pricing, and spring-animated monthly/yearly toggle.

gold.title: Pricing Section 4
gold.reason: Identical implementation to uilayout.contact__pricing-section-4 — full dark section with sparkles, blurred ellipse backgrounds, vertical cut reveal, timeline scroll animations, NumberFlow, and spring toggle. Drop-in gold quality.

gold.title: Pricing
gold.reason: Mouse-reactive spring-physics starfield background, canvas-confetti on annual toggle, NumberFlow animated prices, Framer Motion spring card stagger entrance, and popular plan badge. Unique interactive background elevates it to gold.

gold.title: Squishy Pricing
gold.reason: 3 distinctly colored cards (indigo/purple/pink) with SVG background shapes that physically morph and squish on hover via Framer Motion variants — circles squash, rectangles swap, diamonds stack. Uniquely delightful interaction design.

gold.title: Creative Pricing
gold.reason: Neo-brutalist design with tilted cards (rotate-[-1deg] etc.), handwritten font treatment, hover shadow-offset animations, and a rotated Popular badge. Strong visual identity that stands out from conventional pricing sections (923 downloads / 12 likes).

silver.title: Dark Gradient Pricing
silver.reason: High-quality blur-in scroll animation, dark/light gradient card treatment, check/x benefit indicators, 1,711 downloads / 26 likes. Polished single-direction layout but lacks a billing toggle and full multi-tier section wrapper.

silver.title: Pricing Table
silver.reason: Feature comparison matrix table with animated NumberFlow prices, monthly/yearly interval toggle, plan selection with highlighted active row, popular badge, 901 downloads / 24 likes. Functional comparison table format.

silver.title: Pricing Section
silver.reason: 2-tier 2-column layout with backdrop-blur glassmorphism, monthly/yearly toggle, feature comparison with check/dash indicators, 1,729 downloads / 20 likes. Clean and production-ready, but only two plans.

silver.title: Pricing Cards
silver.reason: Standard 3-tier (Startup/Growth/Enterprise) with shadcn Card, feature descriptions per item, shadow-2xl featured card. Well-structured but visually conventional without animations or toggle.

silver.title: Pricing Cards
silver.reason: Clean 3-tier section (Startup/Growth/Enterprise) with feature lists including descriptions, 1,091 downloads / 6 likes. Solid structure but no billing toggle or animated elements.

silver.title: Pricing 2
silver.reason: 2-plan section (Plus/Pro) with Switch monthly/yearly billing toggle. Standard shadcn block — clean and functional but minimal visual differentiation.

silver.title: Pricing Section
silver.reason: 3-tier with spring-animated billing toggle, NumberFlow price animation, radial gradient background glow, and timeline scroll entrance animations. Full section with good visual polish.

silver.title: Pricing
silver.reason: 3-tier with left-aligned heading, vertical cut reveal text animation, orange popular plan highlight styling, and monthly/yearly toggle. Complete section with decent animation.

silver.title: Pricing Section 3
silver.reason: 3-tier with popular plan scaled to 1.1 and dark gradient background, neutral toggle pill, horizontally aligned layout. Complete and clean but limited visual distinction.

silver.title: Pricing Section 2
silver.reason: 3-tier static section (no billing toggle) with indigo-highlighted Professional plan and masked grid dot background pattern. Good structure without interactive toggle.

silver.title: Pricing Section 1
silver.reason: Single product pricing page with unique two independent toggles (3-month vs forever, personal vs corporate) creating a pricing matrix interaction. Unconventional but fully functional.

silver.title: Pricing Section
silver.reason: 3-tier (Basic/Standard/Pro) with featured plan ring highlight, clean layout using Next.js Link for navigation. Standard quality without animations.

silver.title: Pricing
silver.reason: 3-tier with Framer Motion animated pill toggle, border trail running-light animation on highlighted card, and feature tooltips. Good interactive details elevate it above standard.

silver.title: Pricing With Chart
silver.reason: Unique two-plan layout embedding a recharts LineChart showing plan popularity trends alongside feature lists. The chart integration is a distinctive element even with only two plans.

silver.title: Modern Pricing Table
silver.reason: 3-tier with animated digit-by-digit price flip (custom AnimatedDigit component), Framer Motion stagger entrance, Tabs billing toggle, and featured card gradient. Good animation detail.

silver.title: Pricing Container
silver.reason: 3-tier with 3D tilt on hover via mouseX/Y spring physics, animated floating dots background, price counter animation, and monthly/yearly toggle. Interactive background and 3D tilt are notable (266 downloads).

silver.title: Pricing Slider (Loops.so replica)
silver.reason: Interactive range slider maps to discrete pricing tiers by subscriber count (0 to 1M+) in a Loops.so-style two-column calculator layout. Unique pricing calculator pattern distinct from standard card grids.

silver.title: Animated Pricing Page
silver.reason: Two cards (Landing/Multipage) with Design/Dev mode toggle animating price changes, 3D-style CSS card appearance with perspective transforms. Niche design-tool billing concept with animated transitions.

silver.title: Pricing Component
silver.reason: 3-tier (Free/Pro/Enterprise) with monthly/annual toggle, subtle glassmorphism, and dark/light mode support. Clean and complete but without standout visual effects.

silver.title: Pricing Interaction
silver.reason: Animated plan selector with a sliding border box that transitions between Free/Starter/Pro options, combined with monthly/yearly toggle and NumberFlow pricing. Distinctive selector interaction (459 downloads).

silver.title: Pricing Section
silver.reason: 5-tier layout (Free to Mastermind) with user count multiplier control, annual/monthly toggle, and billing animation. Breadth of plans and team-size multiplier add functional depth.

silver.title: Pricing Component
silver.reason: 2 glassmorphism cards (Starter light / Pro dark) with per-card fast delivery toggle affecting pricing. Clean minimal glassmorphism approach with an interesting card-level toggle pattern.

silver.title: Pricing 1
silver.reason: 3-tier minimal grid (Starter/Pro/Enterprise) with borderless design and code-comment-style '// most popular' annotation. Distinctive typographic personality without animations.

silver.title: Pricing Module
silver.reason: 4-tier (4-column) with monthly/annual Switch toggle, recommended plan scale highlight, and feature included/excluded list using Check/X icons. Complete configurable module with prop-driven architecture.

silver.title: Pricing Table
silver.reason: 4-tier grid with per-tier annual toggle, credit selection dropdown (Select component), info icons on features, and optional footer banner. Flexible interactive table format with multiple controls.

silver.title: Ruixen Pricing 04
silver.reason: 2-tier (Starter/Pro) with NumberFlow and AnimatePresence animated billing period label transitions, detailed feature lists. Clean and animated billing switch.

silver.title: Ruixen Pricing 05
silver.reason: 3-tier (Starter/Pro/Business) with an animated gradient Popular badge using Framer Motion backgroundPositionX looping animation. The looping gradient badge is a distinctive detail.

bronze.title: Radio Group
bronze.reason: Radix UI RadioGroup primitive component — misclassified in the pricing-section category. Not a pricing section at all.

bronze.title: Modern Payment Form
bronze.reason: Credit card payment form with PayPal/Apple Pay/Google Pay buttons and card input fields — a checkout form, not a pricing section.

bronze.title: Pricing Tab
bronze.reason: Only the animated Tab toggle sub-component extracted from aymanch-03's pricing system. A partial building block, not a standalone pricing section.

bronze.title: Pricing Card
bronze.reason: Single animated pricing card with feature/perk sections and one-time payment. No tier comparison or full pricing section layout.

bronze.title: Single Pricing Card
bronze.reason: Single detailed pricing card with an auto-rotating testimonials carousel and dual CTA buttons. Richly detailed but remains a single-card component without tier comparison.

bronze.title: Pricing Card
bronze.reason: Single dark gradient pricing card with discount ribbon and hover scale animation. No multi-tier pricing section structure.

bronze.title: Pricing Card
bronze.reason: Raw building block sub-components (Card, Header, Plan, PlanName, Badge, Price, etc.) exported individually as primitives. Not a usable pricing section.

bronze.title: Pricing Table
bronze.reason: Table structure primitives (PricingTable, PricingTableHeader, PricingTableBody, PricingTablePlan, PricingTableCell) exported as building blocks. Raw primitives, not a composed section.

bronze.title: Single Pricing Card 1
bronze.reason: Shows monthly vs yearly as two side-by-side cards with border trail animation for a single plan. No tier comparison — not a pricing section.

bronze.title: Pricing 6
bronze.reason: Single pricing card with one grouped feature list and no tier comparison. Incomplete as a standalone pricing section.

bronze.title: Squishy Card Component
bronze.reason: Single Pro squishy card using the same SVG morphing pattern as vaib215__squishy-pricing but without the full 3-card pricing section. Sub-component only.

bronze.title: Pricing Card 1
bronze.reason: Single PricingCard component with Framer Motion hover scale, optional image slot, and feature list with Diamond icons. A reusable card primitive, not a full pricing section.

bronze.title: Pricing
bronze.reason: Exports a single PricingCard component without a full multi-tier pricing section wrapper or comparison layout.
